items.title: EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap
items.description: Introduces a protocol-level cap on max gas per transaction to 16,777,216 (2^24) to enhance DoS resilience, improve network stability, and provide more predictable transaction processing.

items.title: EIP-7883: ModExp Gas Cost Increase
items.description: Modifies the ModExp precompile pricing algorithm from EIP-2565: increases minimum gas from 200 to 500, triples general cost, and doubles the cost for exponents larger than 32 bytes.
